# Description

Create documentation for Phase 0.

# [PKT-FND-011](task-0032): Documentation

## Purpose

Create documentation for Phase 0.

## Scope

- User documentation
- Developer documentation
- API documentation

## Implementation

1. Write user docs
2. Write developer docs
3. Document API

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Documentation complete
2. Examples included
3. All features documented
